scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k -n user-svc,api-gateway,shop-svc,order-svc -c cyan,magenta,yellow,blue "pnpm --filter @shop/user-svc start:dev" "pnpm --filter @shop/api-gateway start:dev" "pnpm --filter @shop/shop-svc start:dev" "pnpm --filter @shop/order-svc start:dev"
scripts.lint:services: pnpm --filter @shop/user-svc run lint && pnpm --filter @shop/api-gateway run lint && pnpm --filter @shop/shop-svc run lint && pnpm --filter @shop/order-svc run lint
scripts.typecheck:services: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @shop/user-svc run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shop/api-gateway run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shop/shop-svc run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shop/order-svc run typecheck
scripts.test:services: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @shop/user-svc run test && pnpm --filter @shop/api-gateway run test && pnpm --filter @shop/shop-svc run test && pnpm --filter @shop/order-svc run test
scripts.build:services: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @shop/user-svc run build && pnpm --filter @shop/api-gateway run build && pnpm --filter @shop/shop-svc run build && pnpm --filter @shop/order-svc run build
scripts.verify:services: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint:services && pnpm run typecheck:services && pnpm run test:services
scripts.check:services: pnpm run verify:services && pnpm run build:services
